overview: PHASMA is a public demo platform for surgical robotics reinforcement learning simulation with 3D visualization, real-time training playback, and a SaaS-style Pro workspace preview.
features: Fully public demo — no login required
3D surgical robot and humanoid model visualization
Real-time RL training simulation with reward and loss charts
Free vs Pro workspace switcher with advanced analytics preview
Selectable surgical robot or humanoid model for demo runs
